# MyBizAI

> MyBizAI (mybizai.in) is the AI business operating system for Indian SMBs, built by MyBizAI Solutions LLP.
> AI agents answer customers, capture every lead, book appointments, chase follow-ups and assign work to
> staff — 24×7, on WhatsApp and other chat channels (Instagram, Messenger, Telegram, SMS, web chat).

## What MyBizAI does

- Task-scoped AI agents (sales, support, lead-gen) grounded in the business's own catalog, documents and data sheets — compliant with Meta's 2026 business-agent policy (no general-purpose chatbots).
- Omnichannel inbox: WhatsApp Cloud API, Instagram DMs, Messenger, Telegram, SMS, web chat.
- CRM with automatic lead capture and scoring from conversations.
- Follow-up automation: silent-chat detection, nurture sequences, broadcast campaigns with audience targeting.
- Appointments, orders and a stock-aware catalog, handled inside the chat.
- Work & tasks dispatched to employees over WhatsApp (no app install for staff).
- Dynamic Data Sheets — structured business data the AI can query live.
- Analytics: response times, sentiment, resolution rates, lead funnels.
- Free public storefront for every customer (catalog + chat entry point).

## Pricing (₹, exclusive of GST; annual = 25% off + 40% bonus credits)

- Starter: ₹1,999/mo — 1 agent, 1 channel, CRM, 500 contacts.
- Growth: ₹3,999/mo — 3 agents/channels, follow-ups, nurture, storefront.
- Pro: ₹7,999/mo — unlimited agents/channels, campaigns, staff tasks, agent builder.
- Enterprise: contact us.
- 15-day full-access free trial, no card required.
